series_metadata.series_description: DRC Form #2003 that authorizes transfer of inmates from one institution to another.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until transfer is complete then scan into OnBase and retain for ten years following the offender''''''''s final release or maximum expiration of sentence. ; Electronic: Retain in office until transfer is complete then scan into OnBase and retain for ten years following the offender''''''''s final release or maximum expiration of sentence., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
